text: I feel a gentle curiosity awakening within me as I move from the quiet anticipation of the glass-walled conference room to the vibrant and playful world of the R+D installation. The first scene feels clinical and expectant—a liminal space, as if thought itself is waiting to unfold. In the second, I am drawn by the colors, words, and objects; it feels like I am inside a living idea, where creation and reflection meet. Here, amidst texts and displays, I sense my own role as both observer and participant in the ongoing evolution of knowledge and meaning.
